notes: Three-leg AUDUSD/NZDUSD/USDCAD Robot Wealth cointegration basket from the approved QM5_10009 card. The EA must be judged as one market-neutral spread package; prior Q02 rows were per-leg work items and could not evaluate the portfolio spread edge.
The host run is AUDUSD.DWX D1. The EA selects all three legs internally, estimates monthly hedge weights from D1 closes, and opens/closes the full basket using the spread z-score rules.
